Insights.Text: USA won at home - 3/4 Last Matches

Items.Title: How the USMNT refused to blink against Bosnia and Herzegovina and kept World Cup dreams alive
Items.Description: Despite Folarin Balogun's second-half red card, the USMNT fought through adversity to secure a historic 2-0 win over Bosnia and Herzegovina

Items.Title: Balogun scores & sees red as USA beat Bosnia
Items.Description: Folarin Balogun scores and is later sent off as the United States advance past a lacklustre Bosnia-Herzegovina in Santa Clara to reach the last 16 of the World Cup.

Items.Title: USMNT World Cup Player Ratings: Malik Tillman thrives; Folarin Balogun stars despite red card as USA advance
Items.Description: The Americans won their first World Cup knockout stage game in 24 years, and they did it in style on Wednesday night, overcoming a red card to win 2-0
